key.name: default-titlebar-policy
key.summary: Default title bar visibility for newly created windows
key.description: Determines whether the extension hides or shows the title bar as each new regular window is mapped. Valid values: "visible" or "hidden". Applies retroactively to all open windows without an active per-window override (FR-003, FR-004, FR-021).

key.name: border-thickness
key.summary: Window border thickness in logical pixels
key.description: Thickness of the decorative border drawn around each managed window's outer edge. A value of 0 renders no visible border while keeping all other features active (FR-005, FR-008, FR-014).

key.name: border-color
key.description: RGBA color of the border drawn around windows that are not currently focused. Format: "rgba(<0–255>,<0–255>,<0–255>,<0.00–1.00>)" (FR-005, FR-007, FR-020).

key.name: focused-border-color
key.summary: Border color for the focused window
key.description: RGBA color of the border drawn around the currently focused window. Same format as border-color. When equal to border-color, all windows appear identical (FR-006, FR-007, FR-020).

key.name: toggle-titlebar-shortcut
key.summary: Keyboard shortcut to toggle the focused window's title bar
key.description: Configurable accelerator for the per-window title bar toggle action. Stored as an array so it can be passed directly to Main.wm.addKeybinding() (FR-001, FR-012).

key.name: debug-logging
key.description: When true, emits structured debug output via console.log for decoration decisions. Output visible via journalctl. Zero overhead when false (FR-015).
